ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io API (zsv10pt5-11). National Pokedex no. 591. Artist: Kurata So. Mushroom creature with Poke Ball-patterned arm caps is unambiguous Amoonguss. Pokemon Company internal IP, no external crossover risk. Note: suspected_ip had '#591' suffix — no-hash form correct per anti-confab rules (Obsidian tag-sigil issue).

trivia_bullets.text: Uncommon from Scarlet & Violet Black Bolt (zsv10pt5), released July 18, 2025. 86-card main set (172 total with secret rares), regulation mark I. Artist: Kurata So.
National Pokedex no. 591. Grass/Poison dual-type Stage 1, introduced Generation V (Unova). Evolves from Foongus at level 39.

"It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion." Poke Ball mimicry is Amoonguss's defining design gimmick, shared with pre-evolution Foongus. In Black and White, Foongus physically appears in the overworld disguised as item balls — same deception tactic as Voltorb/Electrode from Gen I.
sources: Bulbapedia: Foongus; StrategyWiki, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Consistent top-tier VGC doubles support across Gen V through Scarlet & Violet: Spore (100% accuracy sleep) + Rage Powder (redirect moves) + Regenerator ability (1/3 HP heal on switch-out). Base Speed 30 makes it a natural Trick Room partner.
sources: Serebii: Amoonguss potw-xy/591; Smogon: Amoonguss SM; game8.co Sword and Shield build guide, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Dangerous Reaction (Colorless, 30+120 if opponent has Special Condition) is a direct mechanical nod to Amoonguss's status-infliction support identity. Secondary attack: Seed Bomb (Grass + Colorless, 60).

related_cards.name: Foongus
related_cards.note: Pre-evolution; same Poke Ball mimicry design; introduced Gen V alongside Amoonguss

related_cards.name: Amoonguss
related_cards.note: Reprinted from Gen V era through Scarlet & Violet; Black Bolt is among the most recent prints

related_cards.name: Vileplume
related_cards.note: Fellow Grass/Poison type with deep-sleep powder/spore identity; closest analog in the TCG support-mushroom niche
